description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat dark roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is clad in light pinkish brick with regularly spaced white-framed windows on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior units. The front of the building is landscaped with green lawns, shrubs, and several trees, and includes a paved entrance path leading to a main doorway. Adjacent to the building is a small parking lot with marked spaces and a few parked vehicles, as well as a trash collection area. Balconies are visible on the sides, offering outdoor space for some units. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular, pink-brick apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, landscaped front, and adjacent parking lot. Balconies and greenery enhance its modern urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped lawn, trees, and the parking lot with trash bins.
description_view_1: Rear view with a secondary entrance, more greenery, and a partial view of the parking lot.
description_view_2: Back side with no visible entrance, regular window arrangement, and a small green area.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting balconies, trees, and the parking lot extending to the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced vertical and horizontal rows on all sides, creating a uniform and balanced appearance.
